settings.heading: Share Your Experience & Earn a Special Offer!

settings.text:
To all Maxfoot Riders,
We’d love to hear your story!
Tell us about your ride and how your Maxfoot e-bike fits into your lifestyle. Share your experience by leaving a review, and you’ll receive a special offer from us as a thank-you!
1. Submit your text review from our request email.
2. Click the link to write your review and upload media on the web.

settings.title: 5% OFF for Text Review
settings.text: Submit your Verified Review(Text Only and at least 30 words) from the review required email, then contact us.

settings.title: 10% OFF for Text + Pictures Review
settings.text: Click the link in the email and write your Verified Review(at least 30 words of Text + 3 Pictures) on the web, then contact us.

settings.title: 20% OFF for Video Review
settings.text: Post a video review on YouTube (at least 60 seconds), tag @maxfootebike6418, and don’t forget to share the link with us!

settings.title: How to increase your chances of getting an offer?

settings.text:
We regularly pick standout reviews to reward with an exclusive offer!
The more thoughtful and detailed your review, the higher your chances of being selected!
Thanks for being part of the Maxfoot family.
We can’t wait to hear your story!
Enjoy your ride!
Maxfoot Bike Inc

*This event takes effect on July 14, 2025. It does not apply to accessory orders placed before this date. No price adjustments, refunds, or exchanges will be offered for prior purchases.
Maxfoot reserved all rights for such an event.
